en-US.name: Ask The Vault
en-US.summary: Hands-free read access to your family vault.
en-US.description: Ask your family vault for saved logins, account numbers, addresses, and notes. Pairs with the Cobb Family Vault (or any open-source fork) using the same one-time code flow as the browser extension. Private — only you and your household see it (Account Only distribution).
examplePhrases: Alexa, ask the vault for the WiFi password
Alexa, ask the vault what's the garage code
Alexa, ask the vault for River's microchip number

publishingInformation.testingInstructions: Account-only skill — uses a paired bearer token to a private family vault instance.
